risk.label: CRITICAL
risk.summary:
Risk Score: 100/100 (CRITICAL) | Open Ports: 10 | Findings: 13 total
  • 6 CRITICAL
  • 2 HIGH
  • 4 LOW
OS: Ubuntu 20.04 Linux (95% confidence)

findings.title: Script [ftp-anon] flagged vulnerability
findings.detail:
Anonymous FTP login is ENABLED — files are publicly readable/writable.

Script output: Anonymous FTP login allowed

cves.description: vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor — opens shell on port 6200

findings.title: Telnet service detected
findings.detail: Telnet transmits ALL data in plaintext. Replace with SSH immediately.

findings.title: SMB service detected
findings.detail: SMB directly exposed. EternalBlue (MS17-010) target. Patch and firewall.

findings.title: Script [smb-vuln-ms17-010] flagged vulnerability
findings.detail:
EternalBlue (MS17-010) confirmed VULNERABLE — patch immediately.

Script output: VULNERABLE
Risk factor: HIGH
CVE:CVE-2017-0144

findings.title: Redis service detected
findings.detail: Redis exposed. Defaults to no authentication. Bind to localhost.

cves.description: Redis Lua sandbox escape — unauthenticated RCE

findings.title: MongoDB service detected
findings.detail: MongoDB exposed. Older versions default to no auth. Critical risk.

findings.title: FTP service detected
findings.detail: FTP transmits credentials in plaintext. Check for anonymous access.

cves.description: vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor — opens shell on port 6200

findings.title: MySQL service detected
findings.detail: MySQL exposed to network. Bind to localhost or restrict with firewall.

findings.title: SSH service detected
findings.detail: SSH exposed. Ensure key-based auth only; disable password auth.

findings.title: HTTP service detected
findings.detail: HTTP (unencrypted). Check for sensitive data exposure, forced HTTPS redirect.

findings.title: HTTPS service detected
findings.detail: HTTPS. Check TLS version (avoid TLS 1.0/1.1), cert validity.

findings.title: HTTP-Alt service detected
findings.detail: Alternate HTTP. May expose admin panels or dev servers.

findings.title: Script [ssh-auth-methods] flagged vulnerability
findings.detail:
SSH authentication methods enumerated.

Script output: publickey,password
